overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall interior resembling a magical school common room or library, featuring gothic vaulted ceilings, large arched windows with natural light, and students in robes studying at wooden tables. High-quality game engine rendering with detailed textures and atmospheric lighting.

entered.detail: high wooden vaulted ceiling with exposed dark timber beams and arches
tall pointed-arch windows with tracery allowing natural light to stream in
ornate wrought iron chandelier hanging from ceiling with multiple candle holders
long dark wooden tables with benches where students are seated studying
dark stone walls with wooden wainscoting and framed portraits hanging above
tall wooden shelving units filled with books against the far wall
large ornate blue patterned rug running down the center aisle

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval hall with gothic architecture, featuring high vaulted wooden ceilings and tall arched windows on the right wall casting natural light across the stone interior. Students in dark robes are seated at wooden tables studying, while one student stands in the central aisle. The space is furnished with iron chandeliers, wooden bookshelves, and a large decorative rug, creating an atmosphere of a historic magical academy or university common room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval hall that emphasizes the scholarly atmosphere of a historic magical academy. It begins by capturing the scale of the gothic architecture, where high vaulted wooden ceilings loom over a stone interior. Natural light streams through tall arched windows on the right wall, illuminating students in dark robes as they study at heavy wooden tables. The perspective then settles on the central aisle where a lone student stands, surrounded by the detailed textures of iron chandeliers, wooden bookshelves, and a large decorative rug.
